title: Quest Eleven
description: Adds a way to repair Music Disc 11 to obtain a new disc with Volume Beta - Eleven. Silence the nightmare, fix the disc.
body:
## Overview  
Adds Music Disc - Eleven, obtained by repairing Music Disc - 11 with an echo shard and a template.

Obtaining the template is no simple feat. Befitting 11's status as a mysterious and nightmareish soundscape, you'll need to overcome a nightmare found in the depths of the world in a sutiably grandiose fashion, by using a mace to fall from the heavens and fell the Warden in a single blow.  

## Ports  
Will only happen to the latest "community consensus" version of Minecraft mods are made for, at my discretion.
